docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCHOA, ELVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, TATIANA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,645.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCHOA, ELVA
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-18-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-18-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-07-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ELVA OCHOA AND DEFENDANT TATIANA TAM. PROOF OF SERVICE SUBMITTED IN COURT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-27-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, TATIANA
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCHOA, ELVA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S.LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, TATIANA
